theme_notes: Touchstones: Trump-Xi Beijing summit ends with 'fantastic deals' Wall Street calls empty (stocks selling off); Pope Leo XIV's first AI encyclical incoming; Russia's deadliest Kyiv missile strike (24 killed); Iran/Strait of Hormuz ships seized; NBA Playoffs (76ers ousted Celtics, Cavs-Pistons Game 6, Spurs up 3-2).
settled: Trump called it 'fantastic.' Markets called it nothing. This is also nothing.
Zero balance. Rarer than a genuine Trump-Xi trade breakthrough.
The Pope's worried about AI annihilating humanity. At least you two are square.
youOwe: Xi got 200 planes. You owe the price of a sad airport sandwich.
Wall Street called Trump's deal 'nothing of substance.' Your debt: same vibes.
Less than a seized Hormuz tanker costs per hour. Still embarrassing.
The 76ers knocked out the Celtics. Your wallet is taking a similar loss.
The Strait of Hormuz is tense. So is every mention of 'the thing you owe me.'
Not geopolitical. But if she files with the UN Security Council, you're cooked.
Russia bombed a Kyiv apartment building. You bombed the shared budget.
Trump claims 'fantastic deals.' You claim you'll pay this back. Both: fiction.
Pope Leo's writing an AI encyclical. Your debt should get its own encyclical.
A ship got seized in the Strait of Hormuz. Your paycheck: similar story.
The Cavaliers are down 3-2. Your finances are just... down.
This isn't a trade war. It's worse. It's a domestic debt situation with memory.
Xi ordered 200 planes. You ordered one too many rounds. Now look at you.
The Spurs are punching above their weight. Your debt is punching yours.
Pope Leo's drafting a moral crisis document. Your bank is drafting its own.
Russia hit Kyiv in its deadliest strike of the year. Your credit score: similar.
Trump flew to Beijing for 'nothing of real substance.' Five figures for nothing real.
The Pope calls AI a 'spiral of annihilation.' Your debt found that spiral first.
theyOwe: They owe you less than what markets lost reading Trump's trade announcement.
Small. Symbolic. Slightly insulting. Just like the US-China agreement.
The Cavaliers owe their fans more than this. So does your partner.
The Celtics got bounced by the 76ers. You're also getting played, just slower.
Enough to matter. Not enough to cause a geopolitical incident. Not yet.
A ship got seized in the Gulf. Your money's in a similar situation.
Russia launched missiles. Your partner launched this number at you. Both sting.
The Strait of Hormuz is blocked. So is every conversation about this debt.
Trump left Beijing without a real deal. Your partner left without paying either.
Pope Leo's worried about AI annihilating humanity. He hasn't seen this spreadsheet.
More than China agreed to in writing from this summit. Slightly more traceable.
The Spurs are up 3-2. Your partner is up this much on you. Finish them.
Xi's 200-plane deal sounds big. Your partner's tab IS big. Both involve flight risk.
More substantive than anything out of the Beijing summit. And even less documented.
The Cavaliers might blow Game 6. Don't let your partner blow off this debt.
Trump called it 'fantastic.' Your partner said 'I'll pay you back.' Same lie.
Russia launched missiles. Your partner launched a five-figure tab. One has oversight.
Pope Leo wrote about humanity's dignity. Your partner's debt is an affront to yours.
